name: AI Search Rollout
summary: Launch retrieval-augmented search across Acme Cloud documentation and the customer console, with permission-aware results, relevance telemetry, and a controlled enterprise rollout.
next_milestone: Approve enterprise beta after relevance and security review
executive_attention: Confirm whether enterprise beta can proceed with a restricted document corpus while the security review closes.

recovery.primary_driver: Permission-aware document indexing has not completed Security review.
recovery.blocking_dependency: Security approval for permission-aware document indexing
recovery.next_action: Complete permission regression testing and decide whether to launch the restricted enterprise beta.
recovery.path_to_green: Security signs off on the validated corpus, relevance scorecards stay within beta thresholds, and risk score drops below 30.

TPM / Program Manager.care_about: The enterprise beta gate depends on a Security approval and a stable relevance scorecard.
TPM / Program Manager.action: Drive the Security review, track corpus scope decisions, and publish a beta-readiness checkpoint.
TPM / Program Manager.path_to_green: Close permission testing and reduce the risk score below 30.

Engineering Manager.care_about: Permission-aware indexing must prevent documents from leaking across enterprise access boundaries.
Engineering Manager.action: Complete regression tests for validated sources and close remaining indexing defects.
Engineering Manager.path_to_green: Security test coverage passes and indexed permissions match source permissions.

Customer Support Manager.care_about: Support needs to understand the restricted beta scope and likely search-quality questions.
Customer Support Manager.action: Prepare beta FAQs and route access or relevance incidents to the AI Platform triage queue.
Customer Support Manager.path_to_green: Support playbooks are published and beta feedback is reviewed weekly.

Product Manager.care_about: The beta launch may need a smaller document corpus to protect the committed date.
Product Manager.action: Approve restricted corpus scope and confirm launch messaging for enterprise beta users.
Product Manager.path_to_green: Launch scope is approved with clear expansion criteria.

Leadership / Executive team.care_about: The rollout is recoverable without a broad launch delay if scope remains controlled.
Leadership / Executive team.action: Support the restricted beta decision if Security testing does not close by the gate.
Leadership / Executive team.path_to_green: Approve a controlled beta and expand only after Security sign-off.

name: Cloud Migration
summary: Move customer-facing API and analytics workloads from the legacy hosting footprint to the standardized cloud landing zone while meeting availability and cost targets.
next_milestone: Approve revised API Services cutover sequence
executive_attention: Approve the revised cutover sequence and temporary dual-run budget before the June maintenance window.

recovery.primary_driver: The API Services cutover rehearsal exceeded the maintenance window and requires a split migration plan.
recovery.blocking_dependency: API Services approval for the revised customer API cutover sequence
recovery.next_action: Approve the split cutover plan after rollback rehearsal review and fund temporary dual-run capacity.
recovery.path_to_green: Approve the two-wave sequence, preserve rollback coverage, complete the first cutover successfully, and reduce the risk score below 30.

TPM / Program Manager.care_about: The migration is blocked on the API cutover sequence, budget exception, and maintenance-window readiness.
TPM / Program Manager.action: Run the steering decision, confirm owners for rollback rehearsal findings, and track the vendor bridge.
TPM / Program Manager.path_to_green: Secure approvals and complete the first cutover wave within the revised window.

Engineering Manager.care_about: The cutover rehearsal overran by 47 minutes and needs a validated rollback path.
Engineering Manager.action: Split the workload sequence, rerun the rollback rehearsal, and validate production telemetry.
Engineering Manager.path_to_green: Demonstrate a cutover plan that fits the maintenance window with tested rollback.

Customer Support Manager.care_about: Customer API availability may be affected during two migration windows instead of one.
Customer Support Manager.action: Prepare customer-impact messaging, escalation routing, and support bridge coverage.
Customer Support Manager.path_to_green: Support readiness is confirmed for both windows with clear incident routing.

Product Manager.care_about: Temporary dual-run spend is required to preserve customer rollback coverage.
Product Manager.action: Approve the time-boxed budget exception and communicate tradeoffs to Finance.
Product Manager.path_to_green: Fund rollback protection through the second cutover wave.

Leadership / Executive team.care_about: The program is Red because customer-facing migration risk and budget decisions need executive alignment.
Leadership / Executive team.action: Approve the revised sequence and dual-run budget exception.
Leadership / Executive team.path_to_green: Resolve the decision blockers and review the first successful cutover wave.

name: Identity Modernization
summary: Replace the legacy authentication stack with a unified identity service supporting enterprise SSO, stronger session controls, and auditable access policies.
next_milestone: Complete workforce SSO pilot and go-live review

TPM / Program Manager.care_about: The SSO pilot is healthy, with two legacy adapters still tracked as planned work.
TPM / Program Manager.action: Maintain the pilot exit checklist and confirm adapter completion dates.
TPM / Program Manager.path_to_green: Keep the risk score below 30 and complete adapter validation.

Engineering Manager.care_about: Audit events and adapter behavior must remain consistent as pilot usage grows.
Engineering Manager.action: Complete adapter testing and review authentication telemetry.
Engineering Manager.path_to_green: Pass adapter validation with no severity-one authentication defects.

Customer Support Manager.care_about: Support should be ready for account-access questions as SSO adoption expands.
Customer Support Manager.action: Validate account recovery guidance and escalation routing.
Customer Support Manager.path_to_green: Support playbooks cover SSO enrollment and recovery scenarios.

Product Manager.care_about: The pilot is progressing toward the planned go-live review.
Product Manager.action: Confirm pilot exit criteria and enterprise rollout messaging.
Product Manager.path_to_green: Approve go-live after pilot exit criteria pass.

Leadership / Executive team.care_about: The program is Green with no current escalation required.

name: Mobile Redesign
summary: Deliver a redesigned mobile experience for account administration, usage monitoring, and incident notifications with improved accessibility and performance.
next_milestone: Release external beta to design partner cohort

TPM / Program Manager.care_about: The external beta remains on plan while Android notification telemetry is monitored.
TPM / Program Manager.action: Track telemetry readiness and coordinate design-partner onboarding.
TPM / Program Manager.path_to_green: Launch beta on schedule and monitor notification delivery.

Engineering Manager.care_about: Android delivery telemetry needs complete funnel coverage before beta scale increases.
Engineering Manager.action: Finish instrumentation and validate alert thresholds.
Engineering Manager.path_to_green: Confirm dashboards and alerts before the external beta.

Customer Support Manager.care_about: Design partners need a clear path for reporting mobile beta issues.
Customer Support Manager.action: Prepare beta support routing and known-issues guidance.
Customer Support Manager.path_to_green: Support intake and escalation procedures are active for beta users.

Product Manager.care_about: Release scope and customer communication are ready for final sign-off.
Product Manager.action: Approve beta scope and design-partner messaging.
Product Manager.path_to_green: Approve scope and proceed with the planned beta cohort.

Leadership / Executive team.care_about: The program is Green and moving into customer validation.
Leadership / Executive team.action: Monitor beta adoption and material customer feedback.

name: Analytics Platform Upgrade
summary: Upgrade the shared analytics platform to improve query performance, telemetry coverage, and dashboard freshness for product, finance, and customer operations.
executive_attention: Align Cloud Infrastructure capacity allocation before the production backfill test.

recovery.primary_driver: Production backfill testing may saturate shared compute capacity.
recovery.blocking_dependency: Cloud Infrastructure reservation for an isolated compute pool
recovery.next_action: Reserve the isolated compute pool and complete a 25 percent scale rehearsal with saturation alerts.
recovery.path_to_green: Reserve capacity, pass the rehearsal without customer workload contention, and reduce the risk score below 30.

TPM / Program Manager.care_about: The backfill performance test is at risk until isolated compute capacity is reserved.
TPM / Program Manager.action: Drive the capacity commitment and track Finance dashboard reconciliation.
TPM / Program Manager.path_to_green: Reserve compute, pass rehearsal, and close metric mismatches.

Engineering Manager.care_about: Shared compute saturation could impact customer workloads during backfill.
Engineering Manager.action: Configure isolated capacity, validate alerts, and run the 25 percent scale rehearsal.
Engineering Manager.path_to_green: Demonstrate backfill headroom without customer workload contention.

Customer Support Manager.care_about: Dashboard freshness or query performance issues could surface during the upgrade.
Customer Support Manager.action: Prepare escalation routing for customer analytics incidents.
Customer Support Manager.path_to_green: Support routing is ready and production rehearsal shows no customer impact.

Product Manager.care_about: Finance dashboards still have metric-definition mismatches during parallel validation.
Product Manager.action: Resolve reconciliation decisions with Finance and approve exit criteria.
Product Manager.path_to_green: Close dashboard mismatches and approve validation exit.

Leadership / Executive team.care_about: The program is Yellow because capacity must be allocated before production testing.
Leadership / Executive team.action: Support the capacity prioritization if Cloud Infrastructure cannot commit by the ETA.
Leadership / Executive team.path_to_green: Secure capacity and complete a clean rehearsal.
